git_witness.note: Public GitHub commit timestamp = the witness that predictions existed before any market resolved (earliest endDate 2026-06-01).

anchoring_prevention.rule: market_p_yes_at_freeze NEVER shown to Opus during P(YES) generation
anchoring_prevention.evidence: code/research/forward_predict_helper.py cmd_prompt() — line 64 only emits id/endDate/question, intentionally omits market price

promotion_gate.condition: After N>=50 resolutions, run debate --critique to decide whether paper-only track promotes to signed Pythia track (data/predictions/p_*.json + IPFS + Nostr Kind 1).

note: Any change to cohort.jsonl, predictions.jsonl, or cohort.meta.json after this freeze invalidates the experiment. verify_freeze.py checks integrity on every cron run.
